mnemonics: S.A.D. - Stands for Structured Analysis & Design, a classic methodology. Think of being 'sad' when a project isn't well-structured.
keyPoints: A methodology is a framework of methods, processes, and practices, not just a single tool.
Waterfall is linear and sequential, while Agile is iterative and incremental.
The choice of methodology depends on project requirements, team size, and risk.
commonMistakes: Confusing a 'method' (a specific technique) with a 'methodology' (a full system of practices).
Assuming one methodology (e.g., Agile) is universally superior for all project types.
